advert.description: The brand name "HILLARYS" and slogan "For the window wise" are displayed prominently on a blue background screen before the ad transitions.
The Barclays logo and tagline "Make money work for you" appear on a white background screen at the end of the ad.
The "ao" smiley logo appears on a green background with the text "Shop now at ao.com" previously visible.
The "Emma" logo with the text "AWAKEN YOUR BEST" and website URL is shown on a white background.
The full "Disneyland PARIS" logo is displayed centrally on screen after shots of park attractions.
The NHS "Smokefree Generation" campaign branding and logo are displayed on a white background.
